nameEN: Holy Egg Festival Praxis Committee Chief, Clarissa
effectEN:
DressUp  - "Earnescorrect Leader, Clarissa" (During this fight, this card is also regarded as the specified card)
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :If you persona rode this turn, this cost may be paid with "Soul Blast (1)". COST  [Discard a grade 3 card with "Clarissa" in its card name from hand], search your deck or drop for up to one "Aim to be the Strongest Idol!", reveal it and put it into hand, and if you searched the deck, shuffle the deck.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :When this unit's attack hits, draw two cards, and all of your rear-guards with "Earnescorrect" in their card names get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

DressUp  - "Archangel of Twin Wings, Alestiel" (During this fight, this card is also regarded as the specified card)
[AUTO](VC):At the beginning of your main phase, choose a card from your bind zone, put it into hand, and bind the top card of your deck.
Black Wings-[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Discard a card from hand], search your deck for up to one card with the Black Wings ability, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
 White Wings-[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from hand], search your deck or hand for up to one card whose original card name is "Archangel of Twin Wings, Alestiel", ride it as [Stand], and it gets drive -1 until end of turn. If you searched the deck, shuffle the deck.
flavorTextEN: The black and white twin wings congratulate the birth of a new life.

effectEN:
DressUp  - "Heartfelt Song, Loronerol" (During this fight, this card is also regarded as the specified card)
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 3 or less unit card from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle the deck.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, choose up to one face up Song from your order zone, and sing it. If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (1) grade 3 card with "Loronerol" in its card name], until end of that battle, this unit gets drive +1, and your opponent cannot call sentinels from hand to (GC).
flavorTextEN: Today is a parade! Let's enjoy singing all together~♪

effectEN:
DressUp  - "Rondo of Eventide Moon, Feltyrosa" (During this fight, this card is also regarded as the specified card)
[CONT](VC):During your turn, if your soul has a grade 3 card with "Feltyrosa" in its card name, all of your front row <Ghost> units get [Power]+10000.
[ACT](VC):1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and until end of turn, this unit gets "[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :When your drive check reveals a <Ghost> normal unit or a grade 3 card with "Feltyrosa" in its card name, you may call that card to an open (RC). If you called a card, this unit gets drive +1 until end of that battle." twice.

DressUp  - "Prismagica, Wilista" (During this fight, this card is also regarded as the specified card)
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), COST  [discard a card from hand], choose a Gem card from your soul or drop, and put it into hand.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1) Gem card], and perform all of the following according to the card name of the card Soul Blast for this cost.
•"Everlasting Sapphire" - Look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to two unit cards from among them, call them to (RC), and shuffle the deck.
•"Truehearted Ruby" - This unit gets [Power] +15000 until end of turn.

nameEN: Fantasia Snuggling in the Moon, Adelheit
effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If a trigger unit was revealed for your opponent's drive check or damage check this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+10000.
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked while boosted, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and perform all of the following.
•Choose one of your other rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and return it to your hand.
•COST  [Remove a [Over] trigger from drop], choose a unit card with grade less than or equal to your vanguard from your hand, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Dear sister― I want to see the same scenery as you.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) by the ability of your vanguard with "Lilfa" or "Michu" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], Counter Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The festival is still going on!

cardNumber: Lyrical Monasterio ~It's a New School Term!~
setId: Lyrical Monasterio ~It's a New School Term!~
effectEN:
[CONT](VC):All of your rear-guards placed this turn get [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if your soul has a card with "Kairi" in its card name, choose up to two of your rear-guards, return them to your hand, choose two cards from your hand, and call them to (RC).
flavorTextEN: The idols shined brightly like stars in the spotlight on stage.
